key.name: toggle-picker
key.description: Keyboard shortcut that opens/closes the clipboard overlay picker.

key.name: history-size
key.description: Maximum number of non-pinned clipboard items kept in memory (5-50).

key.name: max-image-bytes
key.description: Images larger than this (in bytes) are skipped. Default ~5 MB.

key.name: auto-paste
key.description: If true, selecting an item from the picker synthesizes Ctrl+V into the focused app.

key.name: clear-requested
key.description: Incremented from Preferences to request a history clear in the running shell.

key.name: debug
key.description: If true, verbose clipboard capture traces go to the system journal. Default off so clipboard content is not logged.

key.name: max-pinned-images
key.description: Maximum number of pinned images kept on disk. Pinning beyond this evicts the oldest image pin.

key.name: capture-paused
key.description: If true, new clipboard content is not added to history.

key.name: privacy-app-denylist
key.description: List of window class substrings; copies from matching focused apps are skipped.

key.name: privacy-text-denylist
key.description: List of JavaScript regex patterns; matching text copies are not stored.

key.name: paste-delay-text-ms
key.description: Delay before synthesizing Ctrl+V after selecting a text item.

key.name: paste-delay-image-ms
key.description: Delay before synthesizing Ctrl+V after selecting an image item.
